title: Similarities between Shin Godzilla and Evangelion
display_title: Similarities between Shin Godzilla and Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Similarities between Shin Godzilla and Evangelion             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Wed Jun 21, 2017 7:41 am It's been a while since I saw NGE, so when I was browsing through the EvaGeeks wiki, I was rather surprised to find something I had forgotten, but was also instantly recognisable: the Angel Tower. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Similarities between Shin Godzilla and Evangelion             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 21, 2017 3:12 pm Huh! Somehow I managed not to notice the Angel Tower / GojiTail thing, even though I'm the one who added most of the stuff about the former to the wiki! That's really nifty. The "swerving light beam" can probably be traced back at least as far as the God Warriors from the Nausicaa manga. Anno himself animated the melting, somewhat less lively one in the animated film, but you can see them destroying stuff in all their towering, toothy glory in the "God Warriors Attacks Tokyo" tokusatsu short by Anno and Shinji Higuchi, narrated by none other than Megumi Hayashibara.

[]: Re: Similarities between Shin Godzilla and Evangelion             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Wed Jun 21, 2017 3:20 pm Someone's done a really good video on this if you wanted to add more to this post though they used rebuild as the compassion not the original series https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3r_p1mJQPCw
